records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Azerbaijan Equestrian Federation publishes a stable date-addressable current horse-racing calendar.
limitations: The federation confirms a racing context and activity, but the reviewed route is not a stable meeting calendar.
Equestrian, show, polo, and chovqan events must not be mixed with horse-racing fixtures.
No current meeting fields are approved.
records.notes: Retain a federation link-only treatment until a stable current racing calendar is reviewed.
